contents.text: The Hub is the center of Sky Attack – a shared area in the sa:hub dimension that all players can visit.
What do you find in the Hub?

• Goal Objects – Interactive targets where players can turn in items to unlock server-wide progress. New areas, merchants, and features are unlocked this way.
 
• 5 Skill Rooms – After unlocking, specialized rooms for each skill become available.
 
• 5 Merchants – Merchant villagers who exchange Compressed Items for useful goods. Each merchant is specialized in one skill.
 
• Fishing Pond – A special fishing pond in the Hub with its own biome and adjusted loot tables. (Coming Soon – will be fully implemented in the near future)
 
• Dungeon Master – NPC for accessing Dungeons. (WIP)
 
• Leaderboards – Text displays showing the top 5 players for each skill.

Skill Tree: Goal → Skill Rooms → Mining Goal → Fishing Goal → Farming Goal → Combat Goal
 
The Fishing Goal also unlocks the Fishing Pond Goal.
